name: Windows Script Host Execution
description: Execution of a script file (.vbs, .js, .vbe, .jse) via wscript.exe or cscript.exe has been detected, which can indicate malicious code execution.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The date and time when the script was executed.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to wscript.exe or cscript.exe.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the script.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that executed the script.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The name of the computer where the event occurred.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon event ID (expected to be 1).
